text: Patient placed on 1800 kcal diabetic diet, PEG feeds at 60 mL/hr.
Recommend TPN via central line; patient remains NPO pending swallow evaluation.
Nutrition assessment notes moderate malnutrition with poor oral intake over the past week.
Patient prescribed a 2g sodium-restricted diet and started on a daily multivitamin supplement.
Fluid restriction of 1500 mL per day ordered due to renal impairment.
